About the Summit

Where Faith Meets the Marketplace

The Christian Business Summit is a gathering of entrepreneurs, investors, christian and marketplace leaders who believe that business is a sacred calling. This half-day summit brings together voices from across industry and ministry to explore what it means to conduct business with integrity, purpose, and unwavering faith.


Through keynote talks, personal testimonies and practical sessions on financing, you'll leave equipped and inspired to pursue excellence in every venture — not for profit alone, but for a higher purpose.

Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men, knowing that from the Lord you will receive the inheritance as your reward. You are serving the Lord Christ.

Colossians 3:23-24

Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before you register.

This event is for entrepreneurs, professionals, aspiring founders, and investors who want to explore what it looks like to build businesses with integrity, purpose, and faith. Whether you are just starting out or already running a business, if you are serious about building something that lasts — this room is for you.

The Summit is faith-centered and all conversations will be rooted in a Christian worldview. You are welcome to attend if you respect that context — regardless of where you are on your own faith journey. We are not here to preach. We are here to have honest conversations about business, purpose, and character.

It is a half-day event — four hours of keynote sessions, real stories from practitioners, and structured conversations at your table. There are five speakers, a tea break for networking, and intentional table activities designed to help you connect meaningfully with the people seated around you. You will not spend the day in your seat clapping. You will be part of the conversation.

No. The speakers at CBS 2026 are practitioners — people who have actually built businesses, navigated failure, raised capital, and led teams. The sessions are designed around real frameworks and honest stories, not performance or hype. We built this because we were tired of events that leave you inspired for a day and unchanged by Monday.

Registration is simple. Pay KSh 1,000 via M-PESA to Till Number 9962417 (Steward Nexus), then send your name and proof of payment to 0728 094 604 on WhatsApp. Your seat will be confirmed within 24 hours.

The advance price is KSh 1,000 and is available until Friday 13th March. The door price is KSh 1,350 on the day — if seats are still available. We recommend registering early as capacity is intentionally limited to preserve the quality of the experience.

We deliberately capped attendance to create a room where real conversations can happen. Large conferences are great for inspiration — this event is designed for connection, depth, and follow-through. Keeping the room small means every person here was chosen deliberately, and the conversations at your table will actually matter.

Absolutely. Some of the most valuable people in any entrepreneurial ecosystem are those who are still building — aspiring founders, professionals exploring a business idea, or employees who sense there is something more they are meant to build. If that is you, you will leave with clarity, connections, and a clearer sense of your next step.

Bring a notebook, your business cards, and an open mind. Come ready to participate — not just observe. The table activities are designed to be practical, so the more honestly you show up, the more you will get out of the day.

Yes. The Christian Business Summit 2026 is the first event under the Steward Nexus platform, which is being built as a long-term ecosystem for faith-driven entrepreneurs and professionals in Africa. If you want to stay connected and be among the first to hear about what comes next, make sure you register your contact details on the day or follow us at @stewardnexus.
